rows.notes: Large centered year at top of page. Very clear and unambiguous.

rows.description: Domus fund payment on act of
rows.notes: Clear heading immediately under the year; handwriting legible and there are no monetary figures on the same line.
Right-hand column shows a large clear pounds figure '2774' with '7' in shillings column and '4' plus a small halfpenny loop. Vertical ruling lines are clear for alignment.

Word 'Durham' is clear. The small amount adjacent sits in the shillings/pence area (no obvious pounds digit). Pence digit is moderately legible as '6' but faint; assigned 0 pounds, 7s 6d to match column alignment and the balancing of the grouped total (see notes on balancing lines).

Name 'Walsh' clear. The adjacent amount has a clear '7' visible in the pounds column and a '10' in the shillings column on visual inspection, but the digits are small and slightly smudged. Values chosen so that the sum of the small top entries plus the larger later entries matches the boxed total (2921 5s 0½). This balancing inference reduces certainty.
Description legible. Amounts align in the pounds/shillings/pence columns as '6 | 14 | 8' — digits are fairly clear and within valid ranges. No fraction mark present.
Handwritten label 'Domus Battels' (spelling as on page). Amount reads clearly as 15 pounds, 3 shillings, 3 pence; vertical alignment with ruling lines is unambiguous.
Text reads like 'Parlett for Stamps & Parcels' on the original. Amount digits '21 | 16 | 6' are well placed under the pounds/shillings/pence columns and legible.
Single-word entry 'Baker'. Amount '10 | 4 | 3' is clear and aligned with the column lines.
Longer phrase 'Property Tax for the year.' is legible. Amount '85 | 1 | 6' is large and very clear in the pounds/shillings/pence columns.
Boxed/underlined total on the right-hand side showing the pound sign and '2921 | 5 | 0' with a clear halfpenny loop. Vertical rulings provide unambiguous column alignment.
Summary line 'Domus fund Payments' followed by the same figure as the boxed total. Handwriting and numbers are clear; classified as a total because it is the payments subtotal.
Line labelled 'Receipts' with amounts '1659 | 5 | 9' clearly written and used in the subtraction that follows. Interpreted as a subtotal/total.
Underlined resultant figure following payments minus receipts. Written as '1261 | 19 | 3' with a small halfpenny loop visible; ruled alignment is clear.
Header 'Fee fund Receipts' with amount '1889 | 15 | 0' (no pence shown). Clear handwriting and alignment; treated as a receipts subtotal.
Fee fund payments line showing '1090 | 0 | 11'. The small '11d' is legible; classification as total because used in the calculation to produce the fee balance.
Underlined final for fee fund: '799 | 14 | 1'. Clear and aligned with ruled columns.
Repetition of 'Domus fund Receipts' summarised again lower on the page as '1659 | 5 | 9'. Clear writing used in aggregation with fees below.
Handwritten 'Fee do Do' (as on page) with amount '1889 | 15 | 0'. The 'do' repetition is legible but the descriptor is abbreviated; numbers are clear.
Underlined combined receipts figure '3549 | 0 | 9' (result of adding Domus receipts and Fee receipts). Alignment and digits clear.
Date entry on left margin. Very clear handwritten date.
Phrase introducing signatories; legible and contains no monetary amounts.
Re-statement of 'Domus fund payments' with identical figure to earlier; handwriting and halfpenny loop are visible and align with the columns. Classified as a total.
Repetition 'Fee Do Do' (abbreviated wording on page) and amount '1090 | 0 | 11' visible; used to compute the combined total below.
Underlined combined total of payments: computed as 2921 5s 0½d + 1090 0s 11d = 4011 5s 11½d. The handwritten halfpenny loop is visible on the final pence; column alignment is consistent.
Line reads 'Rector deduct receipts' with amount '3549 | 0 | 9' matching the earlier combined receipts total. Clear alignment and digits.

Final underlined figure on the page labelled 'Deficit' appears as '462 | 5 | 2' with a halfpenny loop. Read as 462 pounds, 5 shillings, 2½ pence; digits are legible and consistent with the subtraction shown above.
Signature/name under the 'Examined and Allowed' legend. Handwritten; no amounts present. Some flourishes reduce legibility of letters but name is reasonably clear.
Printed/name style signature 'C. W. Brown Fellow' (as on page). No monetary figures; legible but slightly stylised.
A second signatory appears below C.W. Brown. The handwriting is faint and partly obscured; appears to read '& Hammond' with uncertainty on the remainder. No numbers.
Final signatory 'J. Bywater. Fellow' (handwritten). Legible; no amounts present.
